question: Is the image a realistic photo of a fish tank in a living room corner, viewed from a front-facing eye-level perspective?
Is there exactly 1 rectangular glass fish tank sitting on a black metal stand?
Do the tank's glass edges appear transparent with clear reflections?
Is there exactly 1 white LED light bar placed horizontally on top of the tank?
Does the LED light emit a cool white light shining downward to illuminate the water?
Is there exactly 1 black hang-on-back filter located on the left rear of the tank?
Does the filter outlet create a small stream flowing to the right with visible surface ripples?
Is there exactly 1 transparent heater rod fixed vertically on the right rear of the tank?
Is a red indicator light visible at the bottom of the heater rod?
Is there exactly 1 air stone located at the center rear of the tank near the substrate?
Are fine bubbles rising vertically from the air stone to form a bubble column?
Is the tank bottom covered with light pink fine gravel of uniform particle size?
Are there exactly 2 pieces of driftwood positioned horizontally at the center bottom of the tank?
Is one driftwood piece dark brown with rough texture and the other bright white with wood grain?
Are the driftwood pieces arranged in a crossed position, with the white driftwood positioned more toward the front?
Is there exactly 1 small castle ornament made of plush material located to the right of the driftwood?
Does the castle ornament have a clear pointed top?
Is there exactly 1 brown ceramic small cave located to the left of the driftwood?
Does the ceramic cave have an opening facing to the right with frosted edges?
Are there exactly 3 aquatic plants growing vertically on the left side of the tank?
Do the plants on the left have bright blue leaves bending to the right?
Are there exactly 2 clusters of red-leaf aquatic plants on the right side behind the castle?
Do the plants on the right have broader leaves with wavy edges?
Are there exactly 3 smooth rounded stones in the foreground arranged from left to right?
Do the foreground stones appear wet and shiny with visible highlights?
Is there exactly 1 small round fish food container sitting outside the tank on the right side of the stand?
Does the fish food container have a yellow lid that is tightly closed?
Is there exactly 1 betta fish swimming in the upper left area of the water surface?
Does the betta fish have a mirror-like metallic silver body with flowing fins?
Is the betta fish's head facing towards the right?
Are there exactly 7 neon tetras swimming in the middle layer toward the right?
Do the neon tetras have clear blue and red stripes?
Are all 7 neon tetras facing left and arranged in a row with similar spacing?
Are all main subjects (tank, fish, decorations) complete and clearly visible without significant cropping?
Is the image free from severe visual artifacts or distortions (e.g., merging objects, floating stones, broken geometry)?
